what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata stub for a design-source JPEG image named capital-raise/p-14; it records an addressable id, blob pointer, MIME type, dimensions, provenance, and creation metadata, and states that the file is a source design ground-truth image.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, address, channel, path, blob URI, mime image/jpeg, name p-14, width and height set to 0, source design_source_material, author_session, created timestamp, and empty links array.
Body contains a single line declaring 'SOURCE design ground-truth — capital-raise/p-14.jpg'.
standouts: The image dimensions are recorded as 0x0 despite the MIME type being image/jpeg.
The asset is referenced by a blob URI (blob://b2:256804d4cf33a1044a20e973d58e01f3).
The links array is empty, so no explicit relationships are declared.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for ledger metadata.
References binary content via a blob URI rather than embedding it.
concerns: Width and height are 0, which may indicate missing or unvalidated image metadata extraction.
No descriptive caption, alt text, or content summary for the image is provided.
No links to related design or document entries are recorded.
notes: A sparse ledger entry for a capital-raise design image that gives it a stable address and blob pointer but lacks extracted dimensions and relationships.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What visual content does capital-raise/p-14.jpg contain?
Which slide or document in the capital-raise deck uses this image?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record a design ground-truth image; the file does exactly that as a metadata stub, though its dimensional fields appear unpopulated.
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to catalog a specific design image asset so it can be referenced, versioned, and linked within a larger ledger of capital-raise materials.
contribution: Provides a stable, addressable ledger record and blob pointer for a design-source image asset, enabling future linking, retrieval, and provenance tracking.
summary_for_embedding: Ledger metadata stub for the design-source JPEG image capital-raise/p-14, referenced by a blob URI with zero recorded dimensions and no declared relationships.
intention_for_embedding: To record and make addressable a design ground-truth image asset used in capital-raise materials.
